hero.title: Fast, confidential transcription for your research interviews.
hero.subtitle: Receive your transcripts in 2 minutes, with 98% accuracy, in over 100 languages. Then easily refine them with our powerful editor.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that works best for you. All plans include all features.

personal.name: Personal Use
personal.description: Free for personal use. Bring your own ElevenLabs or Whisper API key.

enterprise.name: Universities & Companies
enterprise.description: Usage-based licensing with our zero-retention API keys included.

encryption.title: Your data stays yours. Forever.
encryption.subtitle: We've built end-to-end encryption into every layer of our platform. From transcription to storage, you maintain complete control over your sensitive research data.

transcription.title: Zero-Retention Transcription
transcription.description: Audio is transcribed by our processors in strict zero-retention mode. No data is stored on external servers.

encryption.title: Instant Encryption
encryption.description: Transcripts are immediately encrypted using your frontend certificate before leaving your browser.

yourControl.title: You Hold the Keys
yourControl.description: Only you have the certificate to decrypt your data. Not even we can access your transcripts.

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge Architecture
zeroKnowledge.description: We designed our system so that we can never access your data, even if we wanted to.

zeroRetention.title: Zero data retention
zeroRetention.description: Transcription processors delete audio immediately after processing.

clientSide.title: Client-side encryption
clientSide.description: All encryption happens in your browser before upload.

gdpr.title: GDPR & DPA compliant
gdpr.description: Built for sensitive research data and personal information.

euServers.title: EU-based infrastructure
euServers.description: All servers and sub-processors are located in the European Union.

testimonials.title: Trusted by researchers worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: See what PhD candidates and researchers say about Humanlogs

researcher1.quote: The audio-based editor is a game changer. I can now review and correct my interview transcriptions in a fraction of the time. The end-to-end encryption gives me peace of mind when working with sensitive participant data.
researcher1.author: Dr. Sarah Chen

researcher2.quote: As a qualitative researcher conducting hundreds of interviews, Humanlogs has transformed my workflow. The speaker diarization is incredibly accurate, and I love that I maintain complete control over my research data.
researcher2.author: Prof. Marcus Williams

researcher3.quote: Finally, a transcription tool built with GDPR in mind from the ground up. The zero-retention policy and client-side encryption make it perfect for handling sensitive medical research interviews. Absolutely essential for my work.
researcher3.author: Dr. Emma Schmidt

features.title: Everything you need to transcribe at scale
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed for researchers, journalists, and professionals

accurate.title: Super accurate transcription
accurate.description: 100+ languages supported with best-in-class AI models. Process 2h of audio in just 10 minutes. Get started in minutes with the most accurate transcription available.

editing.title: Fast editing & corrections
editing.description: Our unique editor combines audio playback and text editing to help you refine transcripts 4 times faster. Click any word to jump to that moment in the audio.

speakers.title: Speaker labels & tools
speakers.description: Automatic speaker diarization with manual labeling, renaming, merging, and removal. Apply text modifiers and organize multi-speaker conversations effortlessly.

projects.title: Organize per project
projects.description: Working on multiple projects? Organize your transcriptions into folders designed specifically for research workflows and team collaboration.

export.title: Export for the real world
export.description: Basic exports to PDF, Word, CSV, and TXT. Advanced exports for word analysis software, extract specific speakers, and custom formatting options.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Share your transcripts and work together on refining them. Perfect for research teams, newsrooms, and collaborative projects.

privacy.title: Privacy by design
privacy.description: Work with sensitive data confidently. End-to-end encryption ensures your transcripts never leave your computer unencrypted. You hold the keys.

selfHost.title: Transparent & self-hostable
selfHost.description: Install Humanlogs on your own infrastructure or within your university network. Full control over your data and processing. Open source and auditable.

feedback.title: Built with your feedback
feedback.description: We're eager to hear from you and implement your ideas. Join a community that shapes the future of transcription tools together.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Humanlogs pricing and features

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no questions asked. If you cancel, you'll continue to have access to your plan until the end of your current billing period, and you won't be charged again.

downgrade.question: Can I downgrade my plan later?
downgrade.answer: Yes, you can downgrade to any plan at any time. The change will take effect at the start of your next billing cycle, and you'll be charged the new rate going forward. Your current plan benefits remain active until the end of the billing period.

freeVersion.question: Is there a free version of Humanlogs?
freeVersion.answer: Yes! Our free plan includes 100 minutes of transcription per month (approximately 3 transcriptions) with full access to all advanced features including end-to-end encryption, our unique audio editor, and speaker diarization. No credit card required.

invoices.question: Can you send me invoices automatically?
invoices.answer: Yes, invoices are automatically generated and sent to your email after each payment. This is handled through our payment partner Stripe, and all invoices include your billing details and can be customized with your company information.

extraHours.question: Can I buy extra hours if I run out?
extraHours.answer: Yes, you can purchase additional transcription minutes at any time if you exceed your plan's monthly allowance. Extra hours never expire and can be used whenever needed, even after your subscription ends.

rollover.question: Do unused hours roll over to the next month?
rollover.answer: No, your plan's included minutes are reset to the plan's limit at the start of each billing cycle. However, any extra hours you've purchased separately do carry over indefinitely and never expire.

overLimit.question: What happens if I go over my included Pro hours?
overLimit.answer: You won't be locked out of the service. Instead, you'll be prompted to purchase additional transcription minutes as needed. Your work is never interrupted, and you maintain full access to all features and your existing transcriptions.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major payment methods through Stripe, including credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), debit cards, and PayPal. All transactions are secure and encrypted.

enterprise.question: Do you offer enterprise or custom pricing?
enterprise.answer: Yes, we offer custom enterprise plans for organizations with specific needs. Contact our sales team to discuss volume pricing, dedicated support, custom integrations, and service level agreements tailored to your requirements.

university.question: Can I get Humanlogs for my university or school?
university.answer: Yes! Institutions can contact us for special academic licensing. Individual students and researchers can also use Humanlogs immediately with our free or paid personal plans. All plans include end-to-end encryption to protect sensitive research data and participant privacy.

security.question: How is my data made secure?
security.answer: Your data passes through our transcription processors in zero-retention mode, meaning nothing is kept after processing is complete. After transcription, everything is end-to-end encrypted in your browser using a certificate that only you control. We cannot access or recover your encrypted data even if you lose your certificate—you have complete control and privacy.

selfHosted.question: Can I use the self-hosted version for free?
selfHosted.answer: Yes, the self-hosted version is free for personal use. However, to deploy Humanlogs within your company, university, or school network, you'll need an institutional license. This includes our zero-retention API keys and professional support.
